module.name: shape
module.description: A geometric shape (rectangle, triangle, ellipse, diamond, pentagon, hexagon, star) with fill, border and centred text. Move / resize / rotate it on the preview in Edit layout.
module.aiSpec: Use to draw a labelled geometric shape (callout box, badge, diagram node) placed on a slide. The shape fills its box and is positioned/sized via x/y/w/h args (percent of the slide, center origin). Block module: the body is the centred label text (markdown), and may be empty for a blank shape. Example: `<!-- @shape type: diamond, fill: #3b82f6, x: 50, y: 40, w: 30, h: 24 -->\n**Decision**\n<!-- @end -->`

snippet.label: Shape (star)
snippet.text: <!-- @shape type: star, fill: var(--accent-color), x: 50, y: 40, w: 18, h: 24 --> <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Shape (labelled box)
snippet.text: <!-- @shape type: rectangle, fill: #3b82f6, x: 50, y: 40, w: 30, h: 16 --> **Label** <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A rectangle with centred text. Move/resize in Edit layout.
